race.comment: Absolute lottery to close the day. SLIPPIN' JIMMY (3) produced a real eye-catcher when resuming over 1200m here last start, coming from well back to get up for third over 1200m. Perfectly placed out to 1400m at the second run back. Finds a similar quality race to the first-up run and from a decent gate will play a big role. HERMANITA (9) stalked the leader into the straight then just got home in midweek company over 1350m at Doomben last time out. Very honest mare who is well-served by the claim and should feature in the finish again. EDITED BY (1) has performed well in open company over longer trips at his past couple. Back in class and has won five from 11 at this distance. Major player. The classy WEIGALL TIGER (2) will improve off a fair first-up run in open company.
